title: Direct-to-market marketplace app for farmers and buyers

requirements.text: Implement Internet Identity authentication and session-aware UI so users can sign in/out and the app can associate all actions (profiles, listings, orders) with the signed-in principal.

quotes: An app for farmers for direct access to market

acceptanceCriteria: User can sign in and sign out using Internet Identity
When signed out, primary actions that require identity (create listing, place order) prompt sign-in
Backend stores and returns data scoped to the caller principal where applicable (e.g., 'my listings', 'my orders')

requirements.text: Create user profile onboarding and management with two roles: Farmer and Buyer. Profiles must include: display name, role, location (free-text), phone/email (optional free-text), and a short bio/description.

quotes: An app for farmers for direct access to market

acceptanceCriteria: On first sign-in, user is prompted to create a profile and select role (Farmer or Buyer)
User can view and edit their profile later
Public profile view is available for farmers from listings (shows display name, location, bio)

requirements.text: Implement product listings that farmers can create, edit, publish/unpublish, and delete. Listing fields: title, product category, unit (e.g., kg, crate, bunch), available quantity, price per unit, harvest/availability date (optional), location (free-text), and description.

quotes: An app for farmers for direct access to market

acceptanceCriteria: Farmer can create a listing and see it in 'My Listings'
Farmer can edit and unpublish/publish a listing
Buyer can browse published listings in a marketplace view
Unpublished listings are not visible to other users

requirements.text: Add marketplace browsing with search and filters for buyers: keyword search (title/description), category filter, location keyword filter, and sort by newest and price (low-to-high / high-to-low).

quotes: An app for farmers for direct access to market

acceptanceCriteria: Marketplace page lists published listings with pagination or incremental loading
Search and filters update results without requiring a full page reload
Sort options change ordering deterministically

requirements.text: Implement an order/request flow: buyers can place an order request against a listing specifying requested quantity, proposed pickup/delivery note (free-text), and optional message. Farmers can accept or decline. Both sides can track status.

quotes: An app for farmers for direct access to market

acceptanceCriteria: Buyer can place an order request from a listing detail page
Farmer can view incoming order requests on a 'Sales' page and accept/decline each request
Buyer can view placed requests on a 'Purchases' page with statuses: Pending, Accepted, Declined, Cancelled
Buyer can cancel a Pending request
Order status changes are persisted and reflected after refresh

requirements.text: Add a simple asynchronous inquiry/comments thread per order request (not real-time): buyer and farmer can post messages on the order detail page, shown in chronological order with author and timestamp.

quotes: An app for farmers for direct access to market

acceptanceCriteria: Both participants (buyer and the listing’s farmer) can add messages to an order thread
Messages are persisted and load on page refresh
Users cannot read or write messages for orders they are not a participant of

requirements.text: Provide core navigation and pages: Marketplace, Listing Detail, Create/Edit Listing (farmer-only), My Listings (farmer-only), Sales (farmer-only), Purchases (buyer-only), Profile, and a lightweight landing page explaining the app.

quotes: An app for farmers for direct access to market

acceptanceCriteria: Role-based navigation hides farmer-only pages from buyers and vice versa
Users can reach all pages via navigation without manual URL entry
Routing works on refresh (no broken deep links)

requirements.text: Design direction: apply a consistent, agriculture-inspired visual theme (avoid blue/purple) using earthy greens, warm neutrals, and clear typography; include a cohesive layout system (header, content width, cards, forms) across all pages.

quotes: An app for farmers for direct access to market

acceptanceCriteria: All pages share consistent spacing, typography, and component styling
Primary/secondary buttons and form inputs have consistent visual states (hover/focus/disabled)
Theme colors are applied consistently and do not use blue/purple as primary branding colors

requirements.text: Add basic data validation and error handling across forms (profile, listing, order request): required fields, numeric validation for quantity/price, and user-friendly error messages in English.

quotes: An app for farmers for direct access to market

acceptanceCriteria: Invalid submissions are blocked with clear inline error messages
Backend rejects invalid inputs and returns structured errors that the frontend displays
Loading and empty states are present for marketplace and order lists

requirements.text: Persist all core entities in the Motoko backend (profiles, listings, orders, order messages) and expose a minimal candid API to support the UI flows, including role- and ownership-based access control for writes and sensitive reads.

quotes: An app for farmers for direct access to market

acceptanceCriteria: Data remains available after canister upgrades/restarts within the template’s standard persistence approach
Unauthorized users cannot modify others’ listings/orders or read order threads they are not part of
Backend provides endpoints needed for: profile CRUD, listing CRUD + browse, order lifecycle, and order messages

requirements.text: Generate and include required static images under frontend/public/assets/generated and render them in the UI (landing page and header branding) without routing images through the backend.

quotes: An app for farmers for direct access to market

acceptanceCriteria: Generated images exist at the specified paths under frontend/public/assets/generated
Landing page and header display the generated assets correctly in the built app
No backend endpoints are used for serving these images

constraints: Backend must remain a single Motoko actor in backend/main.mo (no additional backend services).
Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui or other immutablePaths; compose them from outside those paths.
No real-time features (WebSockets/Socket.io) or third-party auth providers; only Internet Identity.
nonGoals: Payments, escrow, and financial settlement processing.
Delivery logistics, GPS/maps, or geolocation-based features.
Multi-language localization (all user-facing text remains English).
Product image uploads (text-only listings for this version).

required: App logo mark: simple sprout + market stall icon, flat vector style, earthy green and warm neutral palette (farm-market-logo.dim_512x512.png)
Landing hero illustration: farmer holding produce facing a buyer across a small market table, minimal flat illustration, warm tones, plenty of whitespace (farm-market-hero.dim_1600x900.png)
Category icon set: 6 flat icons (vegetables, fruits, grains, dairy, livestock, herbs), consistent stroke/shape style (category-icons-sprite.dim_1024x1024.png)
